subseta
\begin{table}[h!]
\centering
\caption{mycap}
\label{fig:item}
\rowcolors{3}{pink}{}
\begin{tabular}{rlrlr}
\toprule
{} & {} & \multicolumn{2}{r}{Z} & {Y} \\
{} & {} & {a} & {b} & {c} \\
\midrule
\multirow[c]{2}{*}{A} & a & 0 & \textbf{\cellcolor[rgb]{1,1,0.6}{-0.61}} & ab \\
 & b & 1 & -1.22 & cd \\
B & c & \textbf{\cellcolor[rgb]{1,1,0.6}{{\Huge 2}}} & -2.22 & \textbf{\cellcolor[rgb]{1,1,0.6}{de}} \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{table}
